title: Performance Enhancer Next Create Plus - PENC+
description: PENC+ allows you to enjoy Create with the best performance as possible, with the addition of the best utilities and improvements.
body:

Here's where I'd put my spam if I had any

<details>
<summary>PEN FAMILY CHART</summary>

|  | **Performance** | **Vanilla** | **Plus** | **Modded** | **Recomended for** |
|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|
| **[PEN](https://modrinth.com/modpack/pen)** | **Yes**  (Best performace) | **Yes**  (Only has optifine features, Simple Voice Chat and e4mc) | **No**  (Purist) | **No**  (Doesn't change mechanics) | Purist experience |
| **[PEN+](https://modrinth.com/modpack/penplus)** | **Yes**  (Best performace) | **Yes**  (Only has optifine features, Simple Voice Chat and e4mc) | **Yes**  (Adds utilities and improvements) | **No**  (Doesn't change mechanics) | Enhanced vanilla experience |
| **[PENM](https://modrinth.com/modpack/penm)** | **Yes**  (Best performace) | **No**  (It totally changes the game) | **Yes**  (Adds utilities and improvements) | **Yes**  (Features a recopilation of the best mods of each version) | Full modpack experience |
| **[PENC](https://modrinth.com/modpack/penc)** | **Yes**  (Best performace) | **No**  (It totally changes the game) | **Yes**  (Adds utilities and improvements) | **Yes**  (Only has Create) | Vanilla Create experience |
| **[PENC+](https://modrinth.com/modpack/pencplus)** | **Yes**  (Best performace) | **No**  (It totally changes the game) | **Yes**  (Adds utilities and improvements) | **Yes**  (Only has Create) | Enhanced vanilla Create experience |
| **[PEN Vulkan](https://modrinth.com/modpack/pen-vulkan)** | **Yes**  (Best performace with Vulkan) | **Yes**  (Only has optifine features, Simple Voice Chat and e4mc) | **No**  (Purist) | **No**  (Doesn't change mechanics) | Purist experience |
| **[PEN+ Vulkan](https://modrinth.com/modpack/penplus-vulkan)** | **Yes**  (Best performace with Vulkan) | **Yes**  (Only has optifine features, Simple Voice Chat and e4mc) | **Yes**  (Adds utilities and improvements) | **No**  (Doesn't change mechanics) | Enhanced vanilla experience |
| **[PENM Vulkan](https://modrinth.com/modpack/penm-vulkan)** | **Yes**  (Best performace with Vulkan) | **No**  (It totally changes the game) | **Yes**  (Adds utilities and improvements) | **Yes**  (Features a recopilation of the best mods of each version) | Full modpack experience |
| **[PENC Vulkan](https://modrinth.com/modpack/penc-vulkan)** | **Yes**  (Best performace with Vulkan) | **No**  (It totally changes the game) | **Yes**  (Adds utilities and improvements) | **Yes**  (Only has Create) | Vanilla Create experience |
| **[PENC+ Vulkan](https://modrinth.com/modpack/pencplus-vulkan)** | **Yes**  (Best performace with Vulkan) | **No**  (It totally changes the game) | **Yes**  (Adds utilities and improvements) | **Yes**  (Only has Create) | Enhanced vanilla Create experience |

</details>

![Separator](https://github.com/AselElisian/pencplus-minecraft-modpack/blob/main/Images/PENCplus-Separator.png?raw=true)

# **Description**
Lets you enjoy Create with the best performance as posible while adding the best utilities and improvements, always trying to exceed with each update. So that you can dominate the world, one cogwheel at a time!

Differs with the **[PENC](https://modrinth.com/modpack/penc)** version (without the +) adding the most comfortables utilities and improvements. if you are looking for a purist version (only the performance thing), you better download the **[PENC](https://modrinth.com/modpack/penc)** version.

### **Important**

<details>
<summary>To enable Simple Voice Chat and AutoModpack mods</summary>

You will have to port forward the following ports on the server:

Simple Voice Chat >>> Port: `24454`. Protocol: `UDP`.

AutoModpack >>> Port: `30037`. Protocol: `TCP`.

If you don't now how search for a tutorial. Yes, I know I'm not being helpfull over there but the thing is it varies on the server page. Join my Discord so someone may help you, [Discord invite link](https://discord.gg/HFatSHXhJf).

</details>

![Separator](https://github.com/AselElisian/pencplus-minecraft-modpack/blob/main/Images/PENCplus-Separator.png?raw=true)

# **Other modpacks**
**Want a more purist version? Try out [PENC](https://modrinth.com/modpack/pencplus).**

**Interested only in the performance? Try out [PEN](https://modrinth.com/modpack/pen) or [PEN+](https://modrinth.com/modpack/penplus).**

**Want not only the best performance but the best mods? Try out [PENM](https://modrinth.com/modpack/penm).**

**[Check the Vulkan version of my modpacks.](https://modrinth.com/user/AselElisian/modpacks)**

### **Recommended modpacks**
**Looking for a themed modpack? Try out [Kuzaa's modpacks](https://modrinth.com/user/Kuzaa/modpacks).**

![Separator](https://github.com/AselElisian/pencplus-minecraft-modpack/blob/main/Images/PENCplus-Separator.png?raw=true)

# **License**
Please do not redistribute from outside of Modrinth, I may upload the modpack to CurseForge in the future.

You can use the modpack to begin a new one if you link back this page.

![Separator](https://github.com/AselElisian/pencplus-minecraft-modpack/blob/main/Images/PENCplus-Separator.png?raw=true)

# **Credits**
All the mods used are not mine, I am a simply messenger that ease in the making of a modpack. The hard work is made by the modders. Please thank them as I do, and if you very like a mod go to its page and support the creator.
